prompt: I want to pitch a marketplace feature to leadership. We'd need buy-in from the CEO and VP Product before investing in a full PRD. Help me frame this as a one-page brief.
assertions: THE BET section is one sentence capturing what, who, and why now
SIZE OF PRIZE section quantifies commercial or user impact
ROUGH EFFORT is expressed as order of magnitude (days/weeks/months/quarters)
DECISION NEEDED clearly states what approval is requested
